title: AnchorScan report
description: Diagnostic (not prescriptive) read of a business from its real Google Maps reviews. No invented numbers.

businessSummary.description: 1 to 2 sentences: what they do and how they appear to operate, from the reviews

title.description: 3 to 7 word label for the pattern

detail.description: 1 to 2 sentences, specific to this business

evidence.description: a short verbatim quote or paraphrase from a real review that supports this

items.description: a genuinely diagnostic question the owner should answer (how often, how many, who handles it, what happens when)

focus.description: the single area most worth a conversation, framed as a question, never a product pitch
